description: CASE where all branches including ELSE resolve to non-nullable values is non-nullable

columns.name: display
columns.note: ELSE branch is NOT NULL column (name), and THEN branch is guarded by IS NOT NULL check

name: case_mixed_branches
query_sql:
-- @name GetUserDisplayName
-- @returns :many
SELECT CASE WHEN bio IS NOT NULL THEN bio ELSE name END AS display FROM users
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, bio TEXT, age INTEGER, score NUMERIC, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
